nasb.text: After him their brothers carried out repairs under Bavvai the son of Henadad, official of the other half of the district of Keilah.

esv.text: After him their brothers repaired: Bavvai the son of Henadad, ruler of half the district of Keilah.

cnv.text: 下一段由他們的兄弟，管理另一半基伊拉的區長，希拿達的兒子賓內修築。

ccb.text: 再下一段由他的同族兄弟、管理另一半基伊拉的希拿达的儿子巴瓦伊修筑。
